mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consumption_record (record_date, process_id, material_energy_id, consume_value, unit, input_user_id) VALUES (#{recordDate}, #{processId}, #{materialEnergyId}, #{consumeValue}, #{unit}, #{inputUserId})
mapper.select: SELECT cr.*, p.process_name, me.name as material_energy_name, me.type as material_energy_type, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM consumption_record cr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON cr.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN material_energy_info me ON cr.material_energy_id = me.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON cr.input_user_id = u.id WHERE cr.id = #{id}

SELECT cr.*, p.process_name, me.name as material_energy_name, me.type as material_energy_type, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM consumption_record cr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON cr.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN material_energy_info me ON cr.material_energy_id = me.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON cr.input_user_id = u.id ORDER BY cr.create_time DESC

SELECT cr.*, p.process_name, me.name as material_energy_name, me.type as material_energy_type, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM consumption_record cr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON cr.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN material_energy_info me ON cr.material_energy_id = me.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON cr.input_user_id = u.id WHERE cr.record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY cr.record_date DESC

SELECT cr.*, p.process_name, me.name as material_energy_name, me.type as material_energy_type, u.real_name as input_user_name FROM consumption_record cr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON cr.process_id = p.id LEFT JOIN material_energy_info me ON cr.material_energy_id = me.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON cr.input_user_id = u.id WHERE cr.process_id = #{processId} ORDER BY cr.create_time DESC
